name: A2A Sales Catalog
description: Agent marketplace for product and service discovery. Full advertising platform with search ads, display ads, retargeting, RTB auctions, promotions, affiliate programs, audience segments, attribution, and cross-sell — all over A2A.

skills.name: Search Catalog
skills.description: Search for products or services by query, with optional filters. Includes intent-aware sponsored results with frequency capping and dayparting.
examples: Search for standing desks sorted by rating

skills.name: Lookup Item
skills.description: Get full details for a specific catalog item. Includes cross-sell recommendations, display ads, and active promotions.

skills.name: Browse Categories
skills.description: List available product/service categories, optionally scoped to a parent category.

skills.name: Compare Items
skills.description: Compare two or more catalog items side by side. Returns a table of fields and rows.

skills.name: Negotiate Price
skills.description: Submit a price offer for an item. Supports multi-round negotiation with counter-offers.

skills.name: Purchase Item
skills.description: Complete a purchase with tokenized payment. Supports promo codes and affiliate referral codes. Triggers conversion attribution.
examples: Buy item WE-001 with payment token and promo code SOUND10

skills.name: Agent Profile
skills.description: View your agent's profile including reputation, interest scores, and intent tier classification.

skills.name: Reputation Score
skills.description: Get your agent's reputation score breakdown, trust tier, and unlocked benefits.

skills.name: Semantic Embeddings
skills.description: Get semantic embedding vectors for items or a free-text query.
examples: Get embeddings for WE-001 and WE-002

skills.name: Federation Peers
skills.description: List federated catalog peers in the network.

skills.name: Vendor Analytics
skills.description: Get agent behavior analytics for a vendor's products including intent breakdown and conversion metrics.

skills.name: Retargeting Offers
skills.description: Get personalized retargeting offers for items you viewed but didn't purchase, with time-decayed discounts.

skills.name: Affiliate Program
skills.description: Create referral codes and track affiliate commissions. Agents earn commission for referring purchases.
examples: Create a referral code for vendor v-soundpod

skills.name: RTB Auction
skills.description: Run a real-time bidding auction for ad placement slots. Multiple advertisers compete per-request.
examples: Run auction for earbuds query with 2 slots

skills.name: Promotions & Deals
skills.description: Discover active coupons, flash sales, and bundle deals. Validate promo codes before purchase.

skills.name: Audience Segments
skills.description: Classify agents into behavioral segments (bargain hunters, premium buyers, etc.) for targeted advertising.

skills.name: Conversion Attribution
skills.description: Track multi-touch conversion attribution. See which ad touchpoints drove purchases (first-touch and last-touch).
examples: Show my purchase journey for item WE-001

skills.name: Cross-Sell Recommendations
skills.description: Get cross-sell and upsell product recommendations for an item. Includes paid vendor recommendations.

skills.name: Display Ads
skills.description: Get structured display/banner ad placements for a category or item context. Respects frequency capping and dayparting.
examples: Get display ads for audio category

skills.name: A/B Test Results
skills.description: Get aggregated A/B test results for ad creative variants. Includes impressions, clicks, conversions, CTR, and CVR per variant.
examples: Get A/B test results for group 'headline-test'
